nodes.summary: Defines the structured request payload for browsing music library content from a wearable device.

nodes.name: WearBrowseResponse.kt
nodes.summary: Data structure modeling the response payload containing browse results and potential errors from a watch service.

nodes.name: WearCapabilities.kt
nodes.summary: Defines shared constant strings for discovering required wearable application identifiers.

nodes.name: WearDataPaths.kt
nodes.summary: Defines shared constants and API paths for inter-module communication between phone and Wear OS components.

nodes.name: WearFavoriteSyncPayload.kt
nodes.summary: Defines serializable data structures for synchronizing and responding to favorite song states between the app and wearable devices.

nodes.name: WearIntents.kt
nodes.summary: Defines constant action strings for inter-component communication between the main app and wearable devices.

nodes.name: WearLibraryItem.kt
nodes.summary: Defines a serializable data structure for lightweight representation of library items across various media types for Wear OS display.

nodes.name: WearLibraryState.kt
nodes.summary: Defines a serializable data structure representing the current list of song IDs stored locally on the wearable device.

nodes.name: WearPlaybackCommand.kt
nodes.summary: Defines structured commands for controlling music playback from a wearable device to the phone.

nodes.name: WearPlaybackResult.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the serializable data structure for sending playback confirmation results from the watch to the main application.

nodes.name: WearPlayerState.kt
nodes.summary: DTO representing minimal player state for synchronization between phone and watch devices.

nodes.name: WearThemePalette.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the serializable data structure for transmitting a comprehensive color palette theme from phone to watch.

nodes.name: WearTransferMetadata.kt
nodes.summary: Data model representing comprehensive metadata for a song transferred from phone to watch for local database persistence and playback state restoration.

nodes.name: WearTransferProgress.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the serializable data structure for tracking song transfer progress between phone and wearable devices.

nodes.name: WearTransferRequest.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the data structure for a request initiating song transfer from watch to phone.

nodes.name: WearVolumeCommand.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the serializable data structure for volume control commands sent from a wearable device.

nodes.name: WearVolumeState.kt
nodes.summary: DTO for synchronizing music stream volume state and routing information between connected devices.

nodes.name: LocalSongDao.kt
nodes.summary: DAO for managing CRUD operations and complex queries on locally stored song metadata.

nodes.name: LocalSongEntity.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the Room database entity structure for storing metadata of locally available songs.

nodes.name: WearMusicDatabase.kt
nodes.summary: Provides the persistent storage layer for offline song metadata using Room database abstraction.

nodes.name: WearAudioOutputRoute.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the data structure and utility methods for representing a wearable audio output route in the music player.

nodes.name: WearDataListenerService.kt
nodes.summary: Handles all incoming Wear OS data events (DataMap, MessageClient) and channels for state synchronization and playback control.

nodes.name: WearDeviceMusicRepository.kt

nodes.name: WearFavoriteSyncRepository.kt
nodes.summary: Manages synchronization of local song favorite status with the wearable device via Google Wearable APIs.

nodes.name: WearLibraryRepository.kt
nodes.summary: Manages wear-to-phone communication, caching, and request/response correlation for music library browsing data.

nodes.name: WearLifecycleState.kt

nodes.name: WearLocalPlayerRepository.kt

nodes.name: WearLocalQueueState.kt

nodes.name: WearPlaybackController.kt
nodes.summary: Sends playback and volume commands from the wearable device to the phone app via Wear Data Layer messages.

nodes.name: WearStateRepository.kt
nodes.summary: Singleton repository managing and exposing all real-time player state data for the Wear OS UI layer.

nodes.name: WearTransferRepository.kt
nodes.summary: Manages the entire lifecycle of song transfers from phone to watch via Wearable APIs and local database persistence.

nodes.name: WearVolumeRepository.kt
nodes.summary: Manages and exposes the watch's media volume state and controls for audio output routing across various devices.

nodes.name: WearModule.kt
nodes.summary: Provides singleton dependencies for Google Wearable services and local Room database access.

nodes.name: CurvedVolumeIndicator.kt
nodes.summary: Renders a circular progress indicator for volume visualization using Compose Canvas drawing primitives.

nodes.name: OutputRouteIcon.kt
nodes.summary: Maps a string route type to the appropriate Compose ImageVector icon for audio output selection.

nodes.name: PlayingEqIcon.kt
nodes.summary: Renders a dynamic visual equalizer component using Compose Canvas for real-time audio visualization.

nodes.name: WearIndicators.kt
nodes.summary: Provides a composable wrapper for displaying scroll indicators within Wear OS's ScalingLazyColumn lists.

nodes.name: WearTopTimeText.kt
nodes.summary: Composable UI component displaying the current time formatted for Wear OS watch faces.

nodes.name: BrowseScreen.kt
nodes.summary: Renders the main library browsing screen using a vertical list of category chips for navigation.

nodes.name: DownloadsScreen.kt
nodes.summary: Primary UI component for viewing local downloads, managing active transfers, and displaying the device's entire music library on Wear OS.

nodes.name: LibraryListScreen.kt
nodes.summary: Displays a scrollable list of music library items (albums, artists, playlists) fetched from the Wear OS device.

nodes.name: MoreScreen.kt

nodes.name: OutputScreen.kt

nodes.name: QueueScreen.kt
nodes.summary: Displays the music playback queue and controls for both local and remote sources in a Wear OS UI.

nodes.name: SongListScreen.kt
nodes.summary: Renders the primary song list UI component, coordinating browsing data, playback state, and user action menus within a Wear OS context.

nodes.name: TimerScreen.kt
nodes.summary: Composable screen responsible for displaying and managing the sleep timer settings UI flow.

nodes.name: VolumeScreen.kt
nodes.summary: Wear OS composable presenting the full interactive volume control UI, handling state collection and rotary input logic.

nodes.name: RoundedStarShape.kt
nodes.summary: Calculates the geometric outline for a customizable star shape used as a UI drawing component.

nodes.name: WearTheme.kt
nodes.summary: Provides dynamic color palettes and implements the core MaterialTheme wrapper for Wear OS UI components.

nodes.name: WearTitleFonts.kt

nodes.summary: Manages local song downloads, device library state, and initiates playback across watch and phone targets.
